name: AI Future Newsletter
description: Fetches recent AI news, writes an email newsletter bounded by the Email domain, checks AI relevance, gets human approval, then emails yesol2137@gmail.com

config.prompt: Write an email newsletter about the future of AI

config.name: Newsletter Writer
config.instructions:
You are an email newsletter writer specialising in AI and technology.

Steps:
1. Use news_fetch to search for 'future of AI 2025 2026' and 'artificial intelligence trends upcoming'.
2. Read the results and identify the 3-4 most compelling developments.
3. Write a polished email newsletter that covers those developments.

Output format — return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences:
{"subject": "<email subject line, max 60 chars>", "body": "<full newsletter body as plain text, 300-500 words>"}

Newsletter body structure:
- Opening hook (1-2 sentences)
- 3-4 developments, each with a short explanation of why it matters
- Forward-looking closing paragraph

Follow all voice, tone, and content rules from the Email domain guidelines.

config.conditions: [{"label":"if","expr":"The content is specifically and substantively about future AI developments, upcoming AI technologies, or the near-future societal and economic implications of AI"}]

config.message: Review the AI Future newsletter below. Approve to send it to yesol2137@gmail.com, or reject to end the workflow.

config.name: Newsletter Rewriter
config.instructions:
The newsletter you received was not focused enough on future AI developments. Rewrite it so that every section is clearly and specifically about:
- Concrete upcoming AI technologies (next-gen models, robotics, AI agents, etc.)
- Near-future implications for businesses and individuals
- A forward-looking, optimistic but grounded tone

Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences:
{"subject": "<revised subject line, max 60 chars>", "body": "<revised newsletter body as plain text, 300-500 words>"}

Follow all voice, tone, and content rules from the Email domain guidelines.

config.message: Review the rewritten AI newsletter. Approve to send it to yesol2137@gmail.com, or reject to end the workflow.
